title: Press Release | United Nations proposes new global dashboard to measure progress beyond GDP
content:
Press release United Nations proposes new global dashboard to measure progress beyond GDP Secretary-General’s High-Level Expert Group sets out a set of indicators to put people and planet at the centre of decision-making New York, 7 May 2026 — The UN Secretary-General’s Independent High-Level Expert Group on Beyond GDP today released a report proposing the [...]

title: Media Advisory | UN to unveil first global dashboard to measure progress beyond GDP
content:
Media Advisory UN to unveil first global dashboard to measure progress beyond GDP   New York, 4 May 2026 -  The Secretary-General’s High-Level Expert Group on Beyond GDP will present their report to Member States at UN Headquarters in New York on Thursday, 7 May 2026 at 3:00 pm EDT, outlining recommendations for a country-owned, [...]

title: Human spread of hantavirus not ruled out on cruise ship
content:
Hantavirus victims on a ship in the Atlantic Ocean may have been infected prior to joining the cruise and human-to-human transmission on board cannot be ruled out – although it is rare - the World Health Organization (WHO) said on Tuesday. Read Full Story on UN News

The post Human spread of hantavirus not ruled out on cruise ship appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Press Release | UN and Top Design Schools Unveil Next Chapter of Sustainable Tour Guide Uniforms
content:
UN and Top Design Schools Unveil Next Chapter of Sustainable Tour Guide Uniforms   New York, 28 April 2026 The United Nations, with academic and creative partners, today launched the next phase of the UN Tour Guide uniform initiative. The initiative brings together the UN Office for Partnerships and the UN Department of Global Communications [...]

title: WHO calls for stepped up action to eliminate viral hepatitis
content:
Countries are making measurable progress in combatting viral hepatitis, but the disease remains a major global health challenge, the World Health Organization (WHO) said in a new report published on Tuesday.  Read Full Story on UN News

The post WHO calls for stepped up action to eliminate viral hepatitis appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.

title: Renewables rising, Part 2: Seeking stability amid volatile fossil fuel markets
content:
As global energy markets remain volatile and the price of oil high due to instability and conflict in the Middle East, more countries are looking at investing in renewables to shield their economies from the shocks caused by fossil fuel reliance, rein in import bills – and meet key climate action targets.  Read Full Story [...]

The post Renewables rising, Part 2: Seeking stability amid volatile fossil fuel markets appeared first on United Nations Sustainable Development.
